name: Creamy Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 5 sprigs parsley tied together with kitchen string
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter and onions in a large soup pot over low heat. Cook until the onions have softened, about 5-8 minutes.
2. Increase the heat to medium. Add the leek and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the potatoes and paprika; cook for 30 seconds.
4. Stir in the broth, thyme, herb bundle (parsley tied together with kitchen string), and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Bring the soup base to a boil. Cover and simmer until the potatoes are tender, about 50 minutes.
6. Scoop out about 1 cup of the vegetables and mash them; then return them to the pot. Discard the herb bundle.
7. Stir in the heavy cream, salt, and pepper to taste. Cook without boiling until hot throughout.
8. Sprinkle with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
